claim: All-India demand met tops 270 GW at least once this week.
basis: Our own sampling already caught 269.4 GW on 17 Jul; a monsoon lull with high heat-and-humidity load usually nudges the national peak past 270 GW.

claim: Renewables' share of generation tops 34% on at least one midday this week.
basis: We observed 32.8% on 17 Jul; clear post-monsoon afternoons lift solar output and push the instantaneous renewable share higher.
